Who We Are

LUCHO LLC
MOBIL DETAILING

★★★★★ 5.0 · 12 Google Reviews

Lucho LLC is Tracy's premier mobile detailing service. We bring professional-grade equipment and premium products directly to your home or office — no need to drive anywhere.

From luxury SUVs to daily drivers, we treat every vehicle with the same meticulous attention to detail. Our passion is delivering showroom-quality results that leave our customers amazed.

  • Fully mobile — we come to your location
  • Professional-grade equipment & products
  • Interior & exterior specialists
  • Licensed LLC — insured & professional
  • Loyalty program: 5 washes = 1 free
🚐 Mobile Service · We Come To You
What We Offer

SERVICES &
PRICING

Every service performed at your location with professional-grade tools and products. Luxury results guaranteed.

01
Exterior Detail

Hand wash, ceramic shampoo, insect removal, glass cleaning, tire & wheel treatment, fuel compartment cleaning, plastics conditioner & towel dry.

Includes ceramic shampoo + wheel treatment
02
Interior Deep Clean

Deep vacuum, plastic washing, center console cleaning, seat shampoo, steam seat washing, seat belt cleaning, roof cleaning, glass & leather conditioning.

Steam cleaning + leather conditioning included
03
Luxury Gold Package

Our full service — complete interior deep clean plus full exterior detail. Everything included. Free engine wash with every full detail package.

FREE engine wash included
04
Paint & Stain Removal

Specialized treatment for paint spills, stains, tar, and embedded contaminants. We restore your finish so it looks like nothing ever happened.

Light restoration · Headlight restoration $80
